keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY EARS. Ears : Aur., Bell., Calc-c., Cham., Fer-p., Grap., Hep., Lyc., Merc., Petr., Pho., Pic-ac., Psor., Pul., Sil., Sul., Tell. Ears, right : Bell., Flu-ac., Iod., Kali-c., Kali-n., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Plat., Sil., Spo. Ears, left : Anac., Asaf., Bor., Grap., Guai., Ign., Old., Vio-od. Ears, left to right : Grap., Mur-ac. Ears, alternating sides : Bry., Caps., Caust., Chel., Cocc., Fer-p., Glo., Kali-c., Mag-m., Med., Mos., Nit-ac., Sul. Ears, external : Alu., Kali-c., Kre., Merc., Pho-ac., Sep., Spig. Ears, external, red : Aco., Pul., Sul. Ears, external, red, left : Ant-c., Carb-v., Kre. Ears, internal : Calc-c., Caust., Grap., Kali-c., Mang., Nux-v., Pho., Psor., Pul., Sep., Spig. Ears, behind , (also mastoids) : Bar-c., Calc-c., Canth., Caps., Caust., Grap., Lyc., Old., Petr., Pho., Sil., Stap. Ears, behind, moisture : Grap., Lyc. Ears, below : Bell. Ears, lobules : Bar-c., Caust., Chin., Kre. Ears, glands : Bell., Cham., Con., Merc., Rhus-t. Ears, aching : Cham., Fer-p., Nux-v., Pul. Ears, cracked , behind : Grap. Ears, discharge : Calc-c., Con., Lyc., Merc., Psor., Pul., Sil. Ears, discharge, suppressed : Pul. Ears, drum , perforated : Sil. Ears, dryness : Grap., Lach. Ears, excoriated , raw : Ars., Cepa., Kali-bi., Merc., Psor., Sul., Tell. Ears, fetor : Calc-c., Carb-v., Caust., Hep., Kali-p., Nat-c., Psor., Sil., Sul., Thu. Ears, inflamed : Fer-p. Ears, pus , from : Calc-c., Con., Hep., Merc., Pho., Pul., Sil. Ears, stitches in : Bell., Cham., Con., Kali-c., Merc., Nux-v., Pul., Sul. Ears, stopped , as if : Con., Kali-m., Lyc., Merc., Pul., Sil. Ears, urinary symptoms, with : Vio-od. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
